summary_markdown: You showed great **improvement** in your negotiation phrases, but struggled a bit with **tone formality** in your writing and multiple-choice questions. Don't worry, it's all part of the learning process, and we'll work on it together!

prioritized_fixes.why: You used overly casual language in the negotiation email and multiple-choice question.

next_lesson_focus: In our next lesson, we will focus heavily on **tone formality** in writing and speaking to help you sound more professional in your negotiations!
